SEARCH
Package net.sf.jailer.api

Klasse Subsetter

java.lang.Object
net.sf.jailer.api.Subsetter
public class Subsetter extends Object
Generates a subset of a relational database that respects foreign key constraints.
Autor:
Ralf Wisser

  • Konstruktorübersicht

    Konstruktoren
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
    Subsetter()
    Default constructor.
    Subsetter(DataSource dataSource, DBMS dbms, File dataModel, File extractionModel, ScriptFormat scriptFormat)
    Creates a new Subsetter with all mandatory attributes.
    Subsetter(DataSource dataSource, DBMS dbms, URL dataModel, URL extractionModel, ScriptFormat scriptFormat)
    Creates a new Subsetter with all mandatory attributes.
    Subsetter(Subsetter other)
    Copy constructor.

    If true, The exported rows will not be sorted according to foreign key constraints

    Gets maximum number of entities per insert-statement (in export-file, default is 10)

    getNumberOfThreads()
    Gets number of parallel threads (default is 1) to be used.

    Gets parameters.
    Map<String,String>
    getSchemaMapping()
    Gets schema map for destination database.
    WorkingTableScope
    getScope()
    Gets scope of working tables, GLOBAL, SESSION_LOCAL or LOCAL_DATABASE
    Default is GLOBAL.

    getScriptFormat()
    Gets the script format.
    Map<String,String>
    getSourceSchemaMapping()
    Gets schema map for source database.
    DBMS
    getTargetDBMS()
    Gets target-DBMS.
    boolean
    getTransactional()
    If true, export rows in a single transaction.
    boolean
    getUpsertOnly()
    If true, Generate 'upsert'-statements for all entities (in export-file)
    boolean
    getUseRowid()
    If true, use rowid/ctid-column to determine row identity (instead of primary keys)
    boolean
    getUseRowIdsOnlyForTablesWithoutPK()
    If true, use rowid/ctid-column only for tables without primary key.

    Gets schema in which the working tables will be created

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Konstruktordetails

    • Subsetter

      public Subsetter()
      Default constructor.

    • Subsetter

      public Subsetter(Subsetter other)
      Copy constructor.

    • Subsetter

      public Subsetter(DataSource dataSource, DBMS dbms, URL dataModel, URL extractionModel, ScriptFormat scriptFormat)
      Creates a new Subsetter with all mandatory attributes.
      Parameter:
      dataSource - the data-source to connect with the source database
      dbms - the DBMS of the source database
      dataModel - URL of the current data model folder. Use Class.getResource(String) if the data model is available as a resource.
      extractionModel - URL of the extraction model. Use Class.getResource(String) if the extraction model is available as a resource.
      scriptFormat - script format

    • Subsetter

      public Subsetter(DataSource dataSource, DBMS dbms, File dataModel, File extractionModel, ScriptFormat scriptFormat)
      Creates a new Subsetter with all mandatory attributes.
      Parameter:
      dataSource - the data-source to connect with the source database
      dbms - the DBMS of the source database
      dataModel - the current data model (the datamodel's base folder)
      extractionModel - the extraction model
      scriptFormat - script format

  • Methodendetails

    • execute

      public ExportStatistic execute(String whereClause, File exportScriptFile) throws SQLException, IOException
      Generates the export-script.
      Parameter:
      whereClause - if not null, overrides the extraction model's subject condition
      exportScriptFile - the export-script file (compressed if it ends with '.zip' or '.gz')
      Gibt zurück:
      export statistic
      Löst aus:
      InconsistentSubsettingResultException - if ExecutionContext.isAbortInCaseOfInconsistency() and the number of exported rows differs from that of the collected ones
      SQLException
      IOException

    • execute

      public ExportStatistic execute(String whereClause, File exportScriptFile, File deleteScriptFile) throws SQLException, IOException
      Generates the export- and/or delete-script.
      Parameter:
      whereClause - if not null, overrides the extraction model's subject condition
      exportScriptFile - the export-script file (compressed if it ends with '.zip' or '.gz'), optional
      deleteScriptFile - the delete-script file (compressed if it ends with '.zip' or '.gz'), optional
      Gibt zurück:
      export statistic
      Löst aus:
      InconsistentSubsettingResultException - if ExecutionContext.isAbortInCaseOfInconsistency() and the number of exported rows differs from that of the collected ones
      SQLException
      IOException

    • getDataSource

      public DataSource getDataSource()
      Gets the data-source to connect with the database.
      Gibt zurück:
      the data-source to connect with the database

    • setDataSource

      public void setDataSource(DataSource dataSource)
      Sets the data-source to connect with the database.
      Parameter:
      dataSource - the data-source to connect with the database

    • getDbms

      public DBMS getDbms()
      Gets the DBMS of the database.
      Gibt zurück:
      the DBMS

    • setDbms

      public void setDbms(DBMS dbms)
      Sets the DBMS of the database.
      Note that it's not necessary to set the DBMS if BasicDataSource is used.
      Parameter:
      dbms - the DBMS

    • getDataModelURL

      public URL getDataModelURL()
      Gets URL of the current data model (the datamodel's base folder)
      Gibt zurück:
      URL of the current data model (the datamodel's base folder)

      public void setDataModelURL(URL datamodelURL)
      Sets URL of the current data model (the datamodel's base folder)
      Parameter:
      datamodelURL - URL of the data model base folder

    • setDataModelBaseFolder

      public void setDataModelBaseFolder(File datamodelBaseFolder)
      Sets the current data model as File
      Parameter:
      datamodelBaseFolder - represents the folder. Will be converted to an URL an set as datamodel URL
      Siehe auch:
      • setDataModelURL(URL)

      Gets the URL of the extraction model.

      public void setTargetDBMS(DBMS targetDBMS)
      Sets target-DBMS.
      Parameter:
      targetDBMS - target-DBMS. If it's null, target DBMS is assumed to be the same as getDbms()

    • isUnformatted

      public boolean isUnformatted()
      Gibt zurück:
      true: don't format JSON/YAML/XML export files

    • setUnformatted

      public void setUnformatted(boolean unformatted)
      Parameter:
      unformatted - true: don't format JSON/YAML/XML export files

    • isSingleRoot

      public boolean isSingleRoot()
      Gibt zurück:
      allow only a single root/subject object to be written out into JSON/YAML/XML export file

    • setSingleRoot

      public void setSingleRoot(boolean singleRoot)
      Parameter:
      singleRoot - allow only a single root/subject object to be written out into JSON/YAML/XML export file

    • isDisallowNonAggregated

      public boolean isDisallowNonAggregated()
      Gibt zurück:
      if true, raise an error if there are objects not aggregated into any other object in JSON/YAML/XML export file

    • setDisallowNonAggregated

      public void setDisallowNonAggregated(boolean disallowNonAggregated)
      Parameter:
      disallowNonAggregated - if true, raise an error if there are objects not aggregated into any other object in JSON/YAML/XML export file

    • isIncludeNonAggregated

      public boolean isIncludeNonAggregated()
      Gibt zurück:
      write out all objects that are not aggregated in any other object at root level into JSON/YAML/XML export file

    • setIncludeNonAggregated

      public void setIncludeNonAggregated(boolean includeNonAggregated)
      Parameter:
      includeNonAggregated - write out all objects that are not aggregated in any other object at root level into JSON/YAML/XML export file

    • isIgnoreNonAggregated

      public boolean isIgnoreNonAggregated()
      Gibt zurück:
      don't write out any object that are not aggregated in any other object into JSON/YAML/XML export file

    • setIgnoreNonAggregated

      public void setIgnoreNonAggregated(boolean ignoreNonAggregated)
      Parameter:
      ignoreNonAggregated - don't write out any object that are not aggregated in any other object into JSON/YAML/XML export file

    • getNumberOfThreads

      public int getNumberOfThreads()
      Gets number of parallel threads (default is 1) to be used.
      Gibt zurück:
      number of threads (default is 1)

    • setNumberOfThreads

      public void setNumberOfThreads(int numberOfThreads)
      Sets number of parallel threads (default is 1) to be used
      Parameter:
      numberOfThreads - number of threads

    • getTransactional

      public boolean getTransactional()
      If true, export rows in a single transaction. (default is false)
      Gibt zurück:
      true if Import rows in a single transaction

    • setTransactional

      public void setTransactional(boolean transactional)
      If true, export rows in a single transaction. (default is false)
      Parameter:
      transactional - true if import rows in a single transaction

      public WorkingTableScope getScope()
      Gets scope of working tables, GLOBAL, SESSION_LOCAL or LOCAL_DATABASE

    • getAddGoBatchSeparator

      public boolean getAddGoBatchSeparator()
      Gibt zurück:
      if true, insert "GO" batch terminators into generated script (Microsoft SQL Server / Sybase).

    • setAddGoBatchSeparator

      public void setAddGoBatchSeparator(boolean addGoBatchSeparator)
      Parameter:
      addGoBatchSeparator - if true insert "GO" batch terminators into generated script (Microsoft SQL Server / Sybase)

      schemaMapping - schema map

      public Map<String,String> getSourceSchemaMapping()
      Gets schema map for source database.

      the sourceSchemaMapping to set

    • isAbortInCaseOfInconsistency

      public boolean isAbortInCaseOfInconsistency()
      Gibt zurück:
      if true, the Subsetter throws an exception if the result is inconsistent due to insufficient transaction isolation

    • setAbortInCaseOfInconsistency

      public void setAbortInCaseOfInconsistency(boolean abortInCaseOfInconsitency)
      Parameter:
      abortInCaseOfInconsitency - if true, abort the process if the result is inconsistent due to insufficient transaction isolation

    • getModelPoolSize

      public int getModelPoolSize()
      Gibt zurück:
      the size of extraction-model pool (default is 10)

    • setModelPoolSize

      public void setModelPoolSize(int modelPoolSize)
      Parameter:
      modelPoolSize - size of extraction-model pool (default is 10)

    • getLocalDatabaseStorage

      public String getLocalDatabaseStorage()
      Gibt zurück:
      the folder where the local database will be stored. If null, default temp folder is used.

    • setLocalDatabaseStorage

      public void setLocalDatabaseStorage(File localDatabaseStorage)
      Sets the folder where the local database will be stored.
      Parameter:
      localDatabaseStorage - the folder where the local database will be stored. If null, default temp folder is used.

    • setLocalDatabaseStorage

      public void setLocalDatabaseStorage(String localDatabaseStorage)
      Sets the folder where the local database will be stored.
      Parameter:
      localDatabaseStorage - the folder where the local database will be stored. If null, default temp folder is used.

    • getExecutionContext

      public ExecutionContext getExecutionContext()
      Gets the ExecutionContext.
      Use this to set parameters that are not accessible via this facade.
      Gibt zurück:
      the ExecutionContext
